reviews.review_description:
I've only watched one video so far, but I really enjoyed cycling on my exercise bike while looking at the scenery. The footage is smooth with very little camera shake, so I didn't feel motion sickness at all.

If the image quality could be improved further, it would be perfect! I was wondering if the videos were 180° instead of 360°, would that help improve the resolution..? 

I’m really looking forward to seeing better quality and the "coming soon" videos in future updates!☺️

I agree visuals are a bit grainy. I see more cities to come!  Used it with my tony little strider- made the time less boring, and more inviting.  Let’s keep up the momentum tweak and add more please!!!!
